chapter_title.ar: باب السَّلَمِ فِي الرَّقِيقِ وَ غَيْرِهِ مِنَ الْحَيَوَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 98 – The submission of advance payment regarding the slave and others from the animals

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/255)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/255)
text: لَا بَأْسَ بِالسَّلَمِ فِي الْحَيَوَانِ إِذَا سَمَّيْتَ شَيْئاً مَعْلُوماً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is no problem with the submission of the advance payment regarding the animals, when something known is named’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Advance payment to buy an animals is not unlawful if it (the animal) is clearly made known.’”
